fingerprints.method_out_of_state: IdentoGO Out-of-State Live Scan (adds ~$39.95 fee) OR FD-258 hard card via mail (tip: moisturize hands for days prior to reduce smudge rejects)

seo.title: Idaho Pharmacist License Reciprocity - How to Transfer Your License (2026)
seo.description: Already licensed as a pharmacist? Here's whether your license transfers to Idaho - compact status, endorsement steps, fees, and processing time.
seo.keywords: pharmacist license reciprocity idaho, how to transfer pharmacist license to idaho, pharmacist compact idaho, idaho pharmacist endorsement application

board.name: Idaho Board of Pharmacy
board.parent_dept: Idaho Division of Occupational and Professional Licenses (DOPL)
board.mailing_address:
Idaho Board of Pharmacy
11341 W Chinden Blvd, Bldg #4
Boise, ID 83714

license_types.title: RPh, PharmD
license_types.description: The standard credential to practice as a pharmacist in Idaho.

steps.title: Create Account & Start Application
steps.description: Register for an account on the DOPL Professional Online Licensing System and begin the 'Pharmacist by Endorsement' application.

steps.title: Submit Required Documentation
steps.description: Upload all necessary documents, including official transcripts from your pharmacy school and an Affidavit of Licensure from your original state(s) of licensure, through the DOPL Professional Online Licensing System.

steps.title: Complete Criminal History Background Check (CHBC)
steps.description: Follow the instructions provided within the DOPL Professional Online Licensing System to complete the mandatory Criminal History Background Check through the Idaho State Police.

steps.title: Arrange NABP Score Transfers
steps.description: Ensure your NABP e-Profile ID is current and arrange for the official transfer of your NABP NAPLEX and Idaho MPJE scores to the Idaho Board of Pharmacy.

steps.title: Pay Application Fee & Monitor Status
steps.description: Remit the non-refundable application fee of $125.00 through the DOPL Professional Online Licensing System and regularly monitor your application status for any requests for additional information.

documents.detail: Sent directly from your educational institution.
Official verification of passing the NAPLEX and MPJE.

provisional_text: Some states offer an intern or provisional license for graduates actively accumulating required hours or waiting to take the NAPLEX.
reciprocity_text: Pharmacists licensed in another state can often apply via license transfer (reciprocity) through the NABP, though most states still require passing their specific MPJE.

faqs.question: How much does a Idaho pharmacist license cost?
faqs.answer: The initial application and licensing fee varies by state. Check the specific fee breakdown above.

faqs.question: Is the MPJE required in all states?
faqs.answer: Almost all states require passing their state-specific Multistate Pharmacy Jurisprudence Examination (MPJE) to verify knowledge of local pharmacy laws.

faqs.question: Does Idaho have reciprocity for pharmacists?
faqs.answer: No interstate compact currently covers pharmacist practice in Idaho. To work in Idaho, apply for licensure by endorsement through the state board.

faqs.question: How long does it take to transfer my pharmacist license to Idaho?
faqs.answer: Most endorsement applications take 4 to 6 Weeks.

faqs.question: Can I start working in Idaho while my endorsement application is processing?
faqs.answer: A temporary or provisional credential is available while the full endorsement application is pending.

reciprocity.notes: Pharmacists licensed in another state can often apply via license transfer (reciprocity) through the NABP, though most states still require passing their specific MPJE.

hero.title: Become a Pharmacist in Idaho
hero.dek: Pharmacist licensure in Idaho is managed by the Idaho Board of Pharmacy, with applications submitted through the DOPL Professional Online Licensing System.

variants.label: New Applicant
variants.description: How to become licensed/certified for the first time

variants.label: Reciprocity
variants.description: How to transfer your existing credential from another state

variants.label: Renewal
variants.description: How to renew your existing credential

official_links.registration_steps: Navigate to the DOPL Professional Online Licensing System, click 'Register' or 'Create an Account' on the login page. Complete the registration form with your personal details and create a username/password. Verify your email address. Once registered, log in to access the application options and select 'Pharmacist by Endorsement'.
